name: Curry Powder
recipeInstructions:
1. Position rack in the lower third of the oven. Preheat to 300 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Combine coriander, mustard, cumin, fennel, celery, mace, turmeric, and cloves in a 11 x 8 x 2 inch glass baking dish. Stir thoroughly.
3. Bake in the preheated oven for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally. Cool completely.
4. Stir in the crushed red pepper flakes, dried ginger, and dried garlic.
5. Working in small batches, grind the mixture finely using a spice mill, coffee grinder, mini food processor, or blender (the mixture ground in a blender will not have as fine a texture). Divide evenly among jars. Seal tightly. Keeps fresh for up to 6 months. Makes 5 4-ounce jars.
